lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲ ਕੀ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval kee vaar mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Vaar Of Bilaaval, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਉਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਗਾਵਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਨਾਦੁ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har utam har prabh gaaviaa kar naad bilaaval raag |
lines.english: I sing of the sublime Lord, the Lord God, in the melody of Raag Bilaaval.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Salok, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਭਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: aupades guroo sun maniaa dhur masatak pooraa bhaag |
lines.english: Hearing the Guru's Teachings, I obey them; this is the pre-ordained destiny written upon my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਗੁਣ ਉਚਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh dinas rain gun ucharai har har har ur liv laag |
lines.english: All day and night, I chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, Har; within my heart, I am lovingly attuned to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਖਿੜਿਆ ਹਰਿਆ ਬਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh tan man hariaa hoeaa man khirriaa hariaa baag |
lines.english: My body and mind are totally rejuvenated, and the garden of my mind has blossomed forth in lush abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਚਰਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: agiaan andheraa mitt geaa gur chaanan giaan charaag |
lines.english: The darkness of ignorance has been dispelled, with the light of the lamp of the Guru's wisdom. Servant Nanak lives by beholding the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਦੇਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਘੜੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਗੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jan naanak jeevai dekh har ik nimakh gharree mukh laag |1|
lines.english: Let me behold Your face, for a moment, even an instant! ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਤਬ ਹੀ ਕੀਜੀਐ ਜਬ ਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval tab hee keejeeai jab mukh hovai naam |
lines.english: Be happy and sing in Bilaaval, when the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is in your mouth.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗ ਨਾਦ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਜਾ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: raag naad sabad sohane jaa laagai sehaj dhiaan |
lines.english: The melody and music, and the Word of the Shabad are beautiful, when one focuses his meditation on the celestial Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗ ਨਾਦ ਛੋਡਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਤਾ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: raag naad chhodd har seveeai taa daragah paaeeai maan |
lines.english: So leave behind the melody and music, and serve the Lord; then, you shall obtain honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਚੂਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh braham beechaareeai chookai man abhimaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, as Gurmukh, contemplate God, and rid your mind of egotistical pride. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪਿ ਅਗੰਮੁ ਹੈ ਸਭਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਉਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: too har prabh aap agam hai sabh tudh upaaeaa |
lines.english: O Lord God, You Yourself are inaccessible; You formed everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਆਪੇ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈਐ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aape taarree laaeeai aape gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: You Yourself are absorbed in the state of deep meditation; You Yourself sing Your Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਸਭੁ ਜਗਤੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: too aape aap varatadaa sabh jagat sabaaeaa |
lines.english: You Yourself are totally permeating and pervading the entire universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਭਗਤਹੁ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har dhiaavahu bhagatahu dinas raat ant le chhaddaaeaa |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord, O devotees, day and night; He shall deliver you in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae bilaaval na hovee manamukh thaae na paae |
lines.english: In the love of duality, the happiness of Bilaaval does not come; the self-willed manmukh finds no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa tin sukh paaeaa har naam samaaeaa |1|
lines.english: Those who serve the Lord, find peace; they are absorbed in the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paakhandd bhagat na hovee paarabraham na paaeaa jaae |
lines.english: Through hypocrisy, devotional worship does not come, and the Supreme Lord God is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹਠਿ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਵਣੇ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: manahatth karam kamaavane thaae na koee paae |
lines.english: By stubborn-mindedly performing religious rituals, no one obtains the approval of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape aap paarabraham hai paarabraham vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: He Himself is the Supreme Lord God; the Supreme Lord God comes to dwell in his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਪੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੀਐ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh aap beechaareeai vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh understands himself, and eradicates self-conceit from within.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਕਟਿਆ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jaman maranaa kattiaa jotee jot milaae |1|
lines.english: Birth and death are erased, and his light blends with the Light. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਸਚੇ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dukh katteeai sache rahai samaae |
lines.english: The pains of birth and death shall be eradicated, and you shall remain absorbed in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਕਰਿਹੁ ਤੁਮੑ ਪਿਆਰਿਹੋ ਏਕਸੁ ਸਿਉ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval karihu tuma piaariho ekas siau liv laae |
lines.english: Be happy in Bilaaval, O my beloveds, and embrace love for the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa bilaaval anand hai je chaleh satigur bhaae |
lines.english: You shall be blissful forever in Bilaaval, if you walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤੀ ਬਹਿ ਭਾਉ ਕਰਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satasangatee beh bhaau kar sadaa har ke gun gaae |
lines.english: Sitting in the Saints' Congregation, sing with love the Glorious Praises of the Lord forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਜਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak se jan sohane ji guramukh mel milaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, beautiful are those humble beings, who, as Gurmukh, are united in the Lord's Union. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਜੀਆ ਵਿਚਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਸੋ ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਮਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa jeea vich har aap so bhagataa kaa mit har |
lines.english: The Lord Himself is within all beings. The Lord is the friend of His devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਵਸਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਕੈ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਘਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh koee har kai vas bhagataa kai anand ghar |
lines.english: Everyone is under the Lord's control; in the home of the devotees there is bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਾ ਕਾ ਮੇਲੀ ਸਰਬਤ ਸਉ ਨਿਸੁਲ ਜਨ ਟੰਗ ਧਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagataa kaa melee sarabat sau nisul jan ttang dhar |
lines.english: The Lord is the friend and companion of His devotees; all His humble servants stretch out and sleep in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਅਪੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਸਭ ਝਖਿ ਝਖਿ ਪਵੈ ਝੜਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tudh aparr koe na sakai sabh jhakh jhakh pavai jharr |2|
lines.english: No one can equal You, Lord. Those who try, struggle and die in frustration. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਹੈ ਖਸਮੁ ਸੋ ਭਗਤ ਜਨ ਚਿਤਿ ਕਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har sabhanaa kaa hai khasam so bhagat jan chit kar |
lines.english: The Lord is the Lord and Master of all; O humble devotee, remember Him.
